canonical: How to Designate/Undesignate from A/G MAP Mode

source.section: 2.2 - Air-to-Ground Modes > 2.2.2 - MAP (Ground Mapping) Mode > How to Designate/Undesignate from A/G MAP Mode

steps.action: Once A-G MAP mode is selected, press the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the radar screen (RIGHT) to slave the TDC (Throttle Designation Controller) to the current radar screen (diamond should be visible).
steps.voiced: Press Sensor Control Switch RIGHT to slave TDC to the radar screen — confirm TDC diamond appears.

steps.action: Slew the TDC on the desired spot you want to designate using the TDC controls.
steps.voiced: Slew the TDC diamond over your desired designation point.

steps.action: Designate target by using the TDC DEPRESS control (« ENTER »).
steps.voiced: Press TDC DEPRESS to designate the target.

steps.action: The air-to-ground radar will automatically adjust its range to give you a better view of the point you just designated.
steps.voiced: Confirm the radar auto-adjusts range to center the designated point.

steps.action: On the Radar page, a cross will mark the designated point. On the HUD, a diamond will mark the designated point. This point can be used/slaved to by other sensors (like the targeting pod) if desired.
steps.voiced: Confirm cross on radar and diamond on HUD — other sensors can now slave to this point.

steps.action: Note: you can zoom in using either the EXP1, EXP2 or EXP3 expanded modes.
steps.voiced: Zoom in using EXP1, EXP2, or EXP3 if needed.

steps.action: Pressing the « Undesignate » button on the stick will delete the designation point.
steps.voiced: Press the Undesignate button on the stick to clear the designation.
